prompt: The image is an advertisement for a GPS tracking device designed for dogs, featuring a brown dog running in the woods and a close-up of the device. In the foreground, a brown dog and a yellow collar is prominently displayed, running on a dirt path surrounded by trees. To the right of the dog, a text overlay reads "LIVE GPS TRACKING" in black font within a yellow rectangle, followed by "NEVER HAVING TO HOPE SOMEONE SCANS THEIR MICROCHIP" in white font. This text highlights the key benefit of the product. In the bottom center of the image, a close-up view of the GPS tracking device is shown. The device is black with a yellow strap and features the letters "MoS" in white on its front. The strap is made of a textured material and has a black plastic buckle. The overall design of the device appears sleek and modern. The background of the image is a blurred forest scene, with trees and foliage visible behind the dog. The atmosphere is one of freedom and adventure, as the dog runs through the woods with ease.
